metadata.description: Medical-imaging dataset workflow skills for Claude Code: DICOM conversion, dataset acquisition, and nnUNet v2 formatting

plugins.name: ai-hub-skill-set
plugins.description: Three composable skills for medical-imaging dataset work — dataset-acquisition (TCGA/GDC, Kaggle, HuggingFace, Google Drive + sbatch), dicom-converter (DICOM→NIfTI, RTSTRUCT/SEG SOP-UID routing, audit + helper scripts), nnunet-converter (nnUNet v2 formatting for all native formats including 2D, 3D, multi-modal, classification, region-based)
